rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §28.0214, which governs finality of classroom teacher grades. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An examination or course grade issued by a classroom teacher is final and may not be changed unless the grade is arbitrary, erroneous, or not consistent with the school district grading policy applicable to the grade, as determined by the board of trustees of the school district in which the teacher is employed.
_note: Rule text concerns student grade finality; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
